hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows that help compliance analysts triage alerts, summarize cases, and navigate regulatory reviews with AI-assisted guidance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Compliance review slows across disconnected workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams spend excessive time manually reviewing fragmented provider outputs without clear guidance or unified context. This creates inconsistent decisions, lengthy case handling and weaker audit readiness for digital asset businesses under increasing operational pressure.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented provider outputs, applies internal policies and uses AI to support risk-based routing, case prioritization and audit-ready evidence for efficient compliance review workflows.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY channels provider outputs through automated rules, AI-assisted reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support structured compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AI supports analyst case triage and summarization
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how review history and evidence logging preserve audit trails

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected workflow that connects provider outputs, applies rules, routes cases, records decisions and supports audit-ready evidence in digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support AI-assisted review?
faq_2_answer: SFTY assists analysts by summarizing alerts, recommending actions, prioritizing cases and supporting consistent decisions without replacing human expertise or final approval authority.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence in a structured and auditable format to support regulatory reviews and internal investigations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, integrating their outputs into one controlled compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and other providers without replacing them, enabling a connected compliance workflow layer.
final_title: Support analyst workflows with AI-assisted review
final_description: Explore how SFTY helps VASP compliance teams triage alerts, summarize cases and guide decisions with structured AI support.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
